title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入冈比亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入甘比亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Gambia entry gates including TGSB conformity certification (standards body — status unconfirmed, see row notes), PURA operating licence, NAWEC grid-connection approval, donor-project specification compliance (ECOWAS ROGEP, Jambur 23 MW solar context), IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 international standards, UN 38.3 transport requirements via Port Banjul, and 230/400 V 50 Hz grid context — versus China GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 baselines. Tropical climate (hot, humid, dusty) derating requirements flagged throughout.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与冈比亚准入门槛对照——包括TGSB合格评定认证（标准机构——状态未确认，见各行注释）、PURA运营许可证、NAWEC并网批准、捐助方项目规格合规（ECOWAS ROGEP、Jambur 23 MW光伏项目背景）、IEC 62619和IEC 62933国际标准、经班珠尔港进口的UN 38.3运输要求及230/400 V 50 Hz电网背景——对比中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023基准。全文标注热带气候（高温、高湿、多尘）降额要求。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與甘比亞準入門檻對照——包括TGSB合格評定認證（標準機構——狀態未確認，見各行注釋）、PURA運營許可證、NAWEC併網批准、捐助方項目規格合規（ECOWAS ROGEP、Jambur 23 MW光伏項目背景）、IEC 62619和IEC 62933國際標準、經班珠爾港進口的UN 38.3運輸要求及230/400 V 50 Hz電網背景——對比中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023基準。全文標注熱帶氣候（高溫、高濕、多塵）降額要求。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, TGSB conformity scope determination, PURA licence approval, NAWEC grid-connection approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Gambia's regulatory framework for BESS is nascent and several key requirements noted here are unconfirmed from publicly accessible official sources. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Gambia TGSB Technical Regulations, PURA licensing requirements, NAWEC grid-connection specifications, donor-project technical requirements, UN transport regulations, and Port Banjul customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、TGSB合格评定范围裁定、PURA许可证审批、NAWEC并网批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。冈比亚BESS监管框架尚处于起步阶段，本文提及的若干关键要求尚未从可公开获取的官方来源得到确认。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行冈比亚TGSB技术法规、PURA许可证要求、NAWEC并网规格、捐助方项目技术要求、UN运输法规及班珠尔港海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、TGSB合格評定範圍裁定、PURA許可證審批、NAWEC併網批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。甘比亞BESS監管框架尚處於起步階段，本文提及的若干關鍵要求尚未從可公開獲取的官方來源得到確認。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行甘比亞TGSB技術法規、PURA許可證要求、NAWEC併網規格、捐助方項目技術要求、UN運輸法規及班珠爾港海關要求。

answer_first.en: Gambia does not have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation. BESS projects in Gambia operate primarily under donor-project specifications (ECOWAS ROGEP, World Bank, UNDP), PURA operating-licence conditions, and NAWEC grid-connection agreements. The practical gaps for Chinese BESS exported to Gambia are: (1) grid voltage compatibility — Gambia operates at 230/400 V whereas China is 220/380 V, requiring PCS re-parameterisation and re-testing; (2) IEC 62619 cell and module safety evidence as the internationally expected baseline for donor-funded project acceptance; (3) IEC 62933-5-2 environmental and functional safety evidence for tropical climate conditions (high ambient temperature, high humidity, dust ingress); (4) PURA operating licence and NAWEC grid-connection approval — both are mandatory project gates with no publicly confirmed technical specification as of the dataset date; (5) UN 38.3 transport test documentation mandatory for all lithium battery imports via Port Banjul under IMDG; and (6) TGSB conformity certification — the Gambia Standards Bureau (TGSB) role in BESS product conformity has not been confirmed from official sources. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 represent the manufacturing baseline but are not accepted as substitutes for IEC 62619 evidence in donor-project or authority review.
answer_first.zh: 冈比亚尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规。冈比亚的BESS项目主要依据捐助方项目规格（ECOWAS ROGEP、世界银行、联合国开发计划署）、PURA运营许可证条件及NAWEC并网协议运作。中国BESS出口冈比亚的实际差距包括：（1）电网电压兼容性——冈比亚电网为230/400 V，中国为220/380 V，需重新配置PCS参数并重新测试；（2）IEC 62619电芯和模组安全证据，作为捐助方资助项目验收的国际预期基准；（3）热带气候条件（高环境温度、高湿度、粉尘侵入）下的IEC 62933-5-2环境和功能安全证据；（4）PURA运营许可证和NAWEC并网批准——两者均为强制项目门槛，截至本数据集日期尚无公开确认的技术规格；（5）根据IMDG，经班珠尔港进口的所有锂电池强制要求UN 38.3运输测试文件；（6）TGSB合格评定认证——冈比亚标准局（TGSB）在BESS产品合格评定中的角色尚未从官方来源得到确认。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023是生产基准，但在捐助方项目或主管机关审查中不被接受为IEC 62619证据的替代依据。
answer_first.zht: 甘比亞尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規。甘比亞的BESS項目主要依據捐助方項目規格（ECOWAS ROGEP、世界銀行、聯合國開發計劃署）、PURA運營許可證條件及NAWEC併網協議運作。中國BESS出口甘比亞的實際差距包括：（1）電網電壓兼容性——甘比亞電網為230/400 V，中國為220/380 V，需重新配置PCS參數並重新測試；（2）IEC 62619電芯和模組安全證據，作為捐助方資助項目驗收的國際預期基準；（3）熱帶氣候條件（高環境溫度、高濕度、粉塵侵入）下的IEC 62933-5-2環境和功能安全證據；（4）PURA運營許可證和NAWEC併網批准——兩者均為強制項目門檻，截至本數據集日期尚無公開確認的技術規格；（5）根據IMDG，經班珠爾港進口的所有鋰電池強制要求UN 38.3運輸測試文件；（6）TGSB合格評定認證——甘比亞標準局（TGSB）在BESS產品合格評定中的角色尚未從官方來源得到確認。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023是製造基準，但在捐助方項目或主管機關審查中不被接受為IEC 62619證據的替代依據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
